error_signature: webhookId field is empty or null
context_key: n8n API - Create and Activate Workflow
title: Empty webhookId after activating workflow
symptom: After creating and activating a new workflow, the webhookId field is empty in the output, preventing retrieval of the webhook URL.
applies_when: Using n8n API to create and activate workflows
not_this_if: webhookId is populated in the output
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The webhookId is not automatically generated in the output unless explicitly defined in the workflow JSON. If the webhookId is not included in the node configuration, it will remain empty.
fix_steps: Edit the workflow JSON to include the 'webhookId' key in the 'When chat message received' node
Set the value of 'webhookId' to your desired webhook path
Save the workflow and activate it again
agent_instruction: Add the 'webhookId' key to the workflow JSON for the webhook trigger node and set its value.
